case_title: SILVIA GUZMAN VS. ROBERT LOPEZ et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY*****

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-23-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ROBERT LOPEZ AND MARK LOPEZ MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE, FROM THIS COURT TO ALAMEDA COUNTY. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED, NO OPPOSTION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.
